title: clerodendrum galeatum
intro: Clerodendrum galeatum, also known as the Clerodendrum, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum galeatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
